transactions.desc: The Angels selected Mancini's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake and will start at first base and bat seventh against the Astros on Monday.
The Angels recalled Guzman from Triple-A Salt Lake ahead of Monday's game against the Astros, when he'll start at second base and bat fifth.
The Athletics activated Muncy (hand) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Athletics optioned Hernaiz to Triple-A Las Vegas on Monday.
Woodford cleared waivers Monday and elected to enter free agency in lieu of an outright assignment to Triple-A Nashville, Todd Rosiak of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.
The Brewers optioned Yoho to Triple-A Nashville on Monday.
The Astros recalled Whitcomb from Triple-A Sugar Land on Monday, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.
The Blue Jays activated Nance (forearm) from the 15-day injured list Monday.
The Mariners recalled Bliss from Triple-A Tacoma on Monday.
The Cubs optioned Alcantara to Triple-A Iowa on Monday, Tommy Birch of the Des Moines Register reports.
The Blue Jays designated Rodriguez for assignment Monday.
The Red Sox recalled Eaton from Triple-A Worcester on Monday.
The Red Sox optioned La Sorsa to Triple-A Worcester on Monday.
The Rays selected Slater's contract from Triple-A Durham on Monday.
The Rays optioned Dunn to Triple-A Durham on Monday.
The Orioles recalled Gibson from Triple-A Norfolk and will have him start Monday's game against the Mariners at Camden Yards.
The Cubs claimed Nunez off waivers from the Orioles on Monday.
The Angels released Walker on Sunday, Jeff Fletcher of The Orange County Register reports.
The Cubs acquired Kelly from the Dodgers on Sunday in exchange for cash considerations, Jared Wyllys of AllCHGO.com reports.
Haggerty was released by the Rangers on Sunday.
Petry was promoted to Double-A Harrisburg on Sunday, Kyle Williams of TheBanner.com reports.
The Blue Jays assigned Andrews to Triple-A Buffalo after he cleared waivers Sunday, Ben Nicholson-Smith of Sportsnet.ca reports.
The Angels recalled Aldegheri from Triple-A Salt Lake on Sunday.
Colorado optioned Shook to Triple-A Albuquerque on Sunday.
The Rockies recalled Peralta from Triple-A Albuquerque on Sunday.
The Diamondbacks optioned Abner to Triple-A Reno on Sunday.
Arizona reinstated Clarke from the family medical emergency list Sunday.
Pittsburgh selected Wendzel's contract from Triple-A Indianapolis on Sunday.
The Pirates optioned Garcia to Triple-A Indianapolis on Sunday.
The Reds optioned Mey to Triple-A Louisville on Sunday.
